---
pagetitle: "Contact"
---

<div class="page-hero">

<p class="hero-label">Contact</p>

<h1>Let’s Connect</h1>

<h2>Professional networking, academic collaboration, and analytics opportunities</h2>

<p>
Thank you for visiting my portfolio website. You can contact or connect with me through the channels below.
</p>

<p>
<a class="btn btn-primary" href="mailto:wenlutong199@gmail.com">Email Me</a>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/lutong-wen-a26396340/">LinkedIn</a>
</p>

</div>

## Contact Information

<div class="card-grid">

<div class="info-card">
<h3>Email</h3>
<p><a href="mailto:wenlutong199@gmail.com">wenlutong199@gmail.com</a></p>
</div>

<div class="info-card">
<h3>GitHub</h3>
<p><a href="https://github.com/wenlutong199-oss">wenlutong199-oss</a></p>
</div>

<div class="info-card">
<h3>LinkedIn</h3>
<p><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/lutong-wen-a26396340/">Lutong Wen</a></p>
</div>

<div class="info-card">
<h3>Portfolio Website</h3>
<p><a href="https://wenlutong199-oss.github.io/wenlutong199.github.io/">Lutong Wen Portfolio</a></p>
</div>

</div>

## Professional Interests

<div class="wide-card">
<p>
I am open to professional networking, academic collaboration, and opportunities related to business analytics, marketing analytics, project management, and cloud-based analytics.
</p>
</div>
